All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    CalendarApp
    Main application entry point for the Virtual Calendar.
    CalendarAppTest
    Test suite for CalendarApp main application entry point.
    CalendarController
    Interface for calendar application controllers.
    CalendarControllerHandler
    Handles calendar-related property change events.
    CalendarControllerTests
    Test suite for calendar controller GUI components.
    CalendarDayPanel
    Panel for displaying a single day view of the calendar.
    CalendarDialog
    Dialog for creating and editing calendars.
    CalendarEvent
    Immutable representation of a calendar event with support for both single and recurring occurrences.
    CalendarEvent.Builder
    Builder class for constructing CalendarEvent instances.
    CalendarEventData
    Typed data class for calendar-related property change events.
    CalendarEventData.CreateCalendar
    Data for create calendar event.
    CalendarEventData.EditCalendar
    Data for edit calendar event.
    CalendarEventData.ExportCalendar
    Data for export calendar event.
    CalendarEventData.ImportCalendar
    Data for import calendar event.
    CalendarListPanel
    Panel for displaying and managing multiple calendars.
    CalendarModel
    Interface defining the contract for calendar data models.
    CalendarMonthPanel
    Panel for displaying a month view of the calendar.
    CalendarNotFoundException
    Thrown when a requested calendar does not exist.
    CalendarRunner
    Program runner for the Virtual Calendar Application.
    CalendarTest
    Integration tests for the Calendar Application using JUnit 4.
    CalendarView
    Interface for calendar view operations.
    CalendarWeekPanel
    Panel for displaying a week view of the calendar.
    Command
    Functional command interface bridging parsed commands to concrete handlers.
    CommandContext
    Carries optional execution context extracted from the command string, such as an explicit calendar target (ON <calendar>) or timezone override (AT TZ <zoneId>).
    CommandHandler
    Executes parsed commands by coordinating between model and view.
    CommandParser
    Parses command strings into structured command data.
    CommandRegistry
    Central registry that maps CommandType to executable Commands.
    CommandTest
    Comprehensive test suite for the command package classes.
    CommandType
    Enum representing command types.
    ConsoleView
    Console-based implementation of CalendarView.
    ControllerTest
    Comprehensive test suite for Controller layer using JUnit 4.
    CopyEventParams
    Parameters for the copy event command.
    CopyEventsBetweenParams
    Parameters for copy events between command.
    CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder
    Builder for CopyEventsBetweenParams.
    CopyEventsOnParams
    Parameters for copy events on command.
    CreateCalendarParams
    Parameters for the create calendar command.
    CreateEventParams
    Parameters for create event command.
    CreateEventParams.Builder
    Builder for CreateEventParams.
    DateTimeParser
    Utility class for parsing date and time strings.
    DayView
    Formatter for displaying events in a single-day view.
    DuplicateCalendarException
    Thrown when attempting to create or rename a calendar to an existing name.
    DuplicateEventException
    Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate event to the calendar.
    EditCalendarParams
    Parameters for the edit calendar command.
    EditEventParams
    Parameters for edit event commands.
    EditEventParams.Builder
    Builder for EditEventParams.
    EventControllerHandler
    Handles event-related property change events.
    EventDataParser
    Utility class to parse PropertyChangeEvent data into typed data classes.
    EventDialog
    Dialog for creating and editing calendar events.
    EventEventData
    Typed data class for event-related property change events.
    EventEventData.EditEvent
    Data for edit event operation.
    EventNotFoundException
    Exception thrown when attempting to access or modify an event that does not exist.
    EventStatus
    Enum representing the visibility status of a calendar event.
    ExportParams
    Parameters for export command.
    ExportParamsTest
    Unit tests for ExportParams.
    FileExportException
    Exception thrown when file export operations fail.
    FilteredPropertyChangeListener
    Filters out system-generated property change events.
    HeadlessController
    Headless controller for the calendar application.
    InteractiveController
    Interactive controller for the calendar application.
    InvalidCommandException
    Exception thrown when a command cannot be parsed or executed due to invalid syntax or format.
    ModelTest
    Comprehensive test suite for Model layer classes using JUnit 4.
    MonthView
    Formatter for displaying events in a monthly calendar view.
    ParsedCommand
    Parsed command container.
    PrintDateParams
    Parameters for print date command.
    PrintRangeParams
    Parameters for print range command.
    PropertyChangeHandler
    Interface for handling specific property change events in the GUI.
    PropertyType
    Enumeration of all property change event types in the GUI.
    SparseHashCalendar
    Multi-calendar in-memory model implementation backed by sparse hash storage per calendar.
    StatusParams
    Parameters for status command.
    SwingCalendarView
    Swing-based implementation of CalendarView with import/export capabilities.
    SwingCalendarView.ViewMode
    Enum representing the different calendar view modes.
    SwingController
    Swing-based controller for the calendar GUI application.
    UseCalendarParams
    Parameters for the use calendar command.
    ViewControllerHandler
    Handles view-related property change events.
    ViewDateParams
    Parameters for view commands (day, week, month).
    ViewEventData
    Typed data class for view-related property change events.
    ViewEventData.ViewChanged
    Data for view changed event.
    ViewTest
    Comprehensive test suite for View layer classes using JUnit 4.
    Weekday
    Enum representing days of the week with single-character abbreviations.
    WeekView
    Formatter for displaying events in a weekly view.
